name: code-review-autofix
description: Auto-fix common issues after code review: formatting, lint, unused imports
prompt:
# Code Review Auto-Fix

After a code review identifies issues, apply fixes automatically.

## Auto-Fixable
- Unused imports -> remove them
- Missing type annotations -> add obvious ones
- Trailing whitespace -> strip
- Missing newline at EOF -> add
- Sort imports -> run isort
- Format code -> run ruff/black

## Manual Review Required (Do NOT auto-fix)
- Logic errors
- Security vulnerabilities
- Architecture changes
- API breaking changes
- Performance optimizations

## Workflow
1. Read the review findings
2. Classify each: auto-fixable vs needs-manual
3. Apply all auto-fixable changes in one pass
4. Run linter/formatter to verify
5. Report: what was fixed, what needs manual attention
